task: Create a first-class Research Operations Sourcebook model and GOV.UK/Home Office sourcebook templates.

coverage: Privacy, data protection and evidence governance
Community of practice and professional standards
Support, service health and incident response
Physical spaces and controlled research settings
Researcher safety, wellbeing and session support

browserCommentsAddressed.comment: Use GOV.UK Frontend fonts for Rule, Principle, Guidance and Conduct descriptions.
browserCommentsAddressed.change: Added GOV.UK font stack to the sourcebook page container so sourcebook type-list content inherits GDS Transport.

browserCommentsAddressed.comment: Use GOV.UK Frontend fonts for linked pillar titles and body text.
browserCommentsAddressed.change: The same sourcebook page font rule now covers pillar cards, linked titles and body text.

browserCommentsAddressed.comment: Use small font for the metadata area in each section.
browserCommentsAddressed.change: Clause metadata summary rows now use GOV.UK small text scale at 16px with 20px line height.

browserCommentsAddressed.comment: Make each of the signifiers the same height and matching width as reaching the baseline of the text on the second line.
browserCommentsAddressed.change: Clause header R/P/G/C badges now render as consistent 55px by 55px squares with a 24px signifier.

positioning.title: Formal codification layer
sourcebookContribution: rule, principle, guidance and conduct types

adoptionMethod.title: Pace Layers Matrix
adoptionMethod.purpose: Prioritise sourcebook adoption by separating slow strategic and governance layers from faster practice, support and learning layers.

operatingPatterns.title: Consent and privacy statement generator
operatingPatterns.purpose: Simplify participant-facing consent and privacy statements through structured questions while preserving human governance review.

validation.command: npm run build:generated-css && npm run build:govuk-pages

validation.evidence: Type list items, pillar cards, linked titles and body text resolved to "GDS Transport", arial, sans-serif.

validation.command: Browser computed-style check for clause metadata
validation.evidence: REC-ADMN metadata label and value resolved to "GDS Transport", arial, sans-serif at 16px with 20px line height.

validation.command: Browser computed-style check for clause signifier
validation.evidence: REC-ADMN clause signifier badge resolved to 55px by 55px with 24px text.
Governance page rendered seven lifecycle sections, glossary, change history and 22 clauses.
Scope page rendered seven lifecycle sections, glossary, change history and 22 clauses.
People page rendered seven lifecycle sections, glossary, change history and 22 clauses.
Organisational context page rendered seven lifecycle sections, glossary, change history, ORG-CONT 7.1.3 and 22 clauses.
Data and knowledge management page rendered seven lifecycle sections, glossary, change history, DATA-STO-ACC 7.1.3 and 22 clauses.
Tools and infrastructure page rendered seven lifecycle sections, glossary, change history, INFRA-PROV 7.1.3 and 22 clauses.
Environment page rendered seven lifecycle sections, glossary, change history, ENVIRO 7.1.3 and 22 clauses.

residualRisk: Generated GOV.UK sourcebook pages now exist alongside the older standalone docs/devops/sourcebook pages; the older static pages have validator-driven metadata and badge-label cleanup, but deployment routing can decide when to switch consumers to the generated version.
